     The Numbers Business Report

The Darkest Minds (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,695,691Details
International Box Office $25,665,737
Worldwide Box Office $38,361,428
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,301,036
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,464,788
Total $3,765,824
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When teens mysteriously develop powerful new abilities, they are declared a threat by the government and detained. Sixteen-year-old Ruby, one of the most powerful young people anyone has encountered, escapes her camp and joins a group of runaway teens seeking safe haven. Soon this newfound family realizes that, in a world in which the adults in power have betrayed them, running is not enough and they must wage a resistance, using their collective power to take back control of their future.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,842,609 (46.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.17 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$34,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,127 opening theaters/3,127 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $16,667,444

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (Thailand)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (Thailand)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide), released as Тъмна дарба (Bulgaria)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide), released as Karanlık Zihinler (Turkey)
Video Release: October 2nd, 2018 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence including disturbing images, and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2533 (Cert #51140), 6/19/2018)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: Betrayal, Bounty Hunter, Faulty Memory, Fugitive / On the Run, Psychics, Resistance Fighter, Runaway, Sex Crimes, Suicide
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Near Future
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 21 Laps Entertainment, TSG Entertainment, 20th Century Fox
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Soon this newfound family realizes that, in a world in which the adults in power have betrayed them, running is not enough and they must wage a resistance, using their collective power to take back control of their future.
